backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented Valentine features with associated files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing all frontend Valentine components and styling files.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell loading the Valentine React app.
frontend/src/components/valentine/Celebr: Displays animated falling flowers and rising hearts for celebration effects.
frontend/src/components/valentine/FinalG: Shows a romantic final card with hearts, quote, and actions to continue, restart, or share.
frontend/src/components/valentine/Floati: Renders animated floating hearts and decorative sticker images.
frontend/src/components/valentine/LoveLe: Envelope reveal interaction that animates open before progressing.
frontend/src/components/valentine/Messag: Controls the full step-by-step Valentine message flow including intro, messages, photos, final card, and proposal.
frontend/src/components/valentine/Photos: Displays three static uploaded photos under the heading 'face of my heart' with a continue button.
frontend/src/components/valentine/Propos: Renders a Valentine proposal interaction with a moving 'No' button, triggering a celebration and popup when 'Yes' is clicked. Manages button positioning and UI state for animations and overlays.
frontend/src/components/valentine/Succes: Displays a modal dialog celebrating acceptance, with a close button. Uses UI dialog components and themed styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the current Internet Identity, recreating and invalidating queries when identity changes. Returns the actor and fetch state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, including loading stored identities, login flow, and identity state flags. Wraps the app to expose identity and auth actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty module exported intentionally since no backend queries are needed for this frontend-focused project.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, Valentine-themed color variables, fonts, and custom animations for the UI. Applies light and dark mode palettes with decorative effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
Renders the main Valentine landing page with floating decorations, step-based content flow, and a themed footer. Manages the current step in the reveal sequence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with Valentine color variables, extended theme settings, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animation.
project_state.json: Contains project metadata, feature definitions, and architectural notes for building a romantic Valentine-themed landing experience with interactive animations and a final proposal page. Tracks existing features, requirements, and project state versioning.
